title: 2021 Archer and Olive Planner Reveal
excerpt: Friends, I’m so happy to announce that my brand new 2021 planners with Archer and Olive are here and ready for pre-order ! For 2021, we’ll be offering two weekly planners - a dated version and an undated one! We…
body:
Friends, I’m so happy to announce that my brand new 2021 planners with Archer and Olive are here and ready for pre-order!

For 2021, we’ll be offering two weekly planners - a dated version and an undated one! We also tried to incorporate many of your requests like more blank pages and larger sections for the weekends! Watch the complete planner flip through video on my YouTube channel!

If you’ve used an Archer and Olive planner before, you know that their quality is impeccable! Their smooth, thick pages hold up really well to watercoloring and stamping. These weekly planners are the perfect canvas to document your plans and dreams, explore your creativity and fuel your passions!

Both planners are available for pre-order and right now you can save 15% off your purchase (look under “Planners” on the Archer and Olive site)! Planners start shipping the first week of December. Also, all Amy Tangerine pre-ordered planners will get a FREE coordinating sticker pack!!

(If you’re new here, check out my Plan with Me videos using my 2020 planner!)

I know many of you in the planner community have been looking forward to seeing these new planners and I want to thank you so much for your enthusiasm and your patience. I hope you will love using these planners as much as I have over the last couple of years!

Let me know in the comments below - what do you think of the covers? And which planner do you prefer - dated or undated? I can’t wait to see what you do with your planners!
